frontend.description: User interface, client state, accessibility, design systems, and browser performance.

backend.description: Application services, APIs, server runtimes, workers, queues, and integrations.

database.description: Schema, migrations, queries, indexes, RLS, data consistency, and persistence.

security.description: Secrets, authorization, injection risks, supply chain, and production safety.

testing.description: Unit, integration, browser, mobile, regression, and TDD workflows.

docs.description: Documentation, changelogs, release notes, knowledge bases, and decision records.

ops.description: CI/CD, deployment, observability, cost, reliability, and incident response.

ml.description: Machine learning pipelines, model evaluation, data science, and experiment tracking.

general.description: Fallback domain for simple or uncategorized work.
